productDisplayName: Nike Men As Ss Cruiser Yellow T-Shirts
description: Composition Yellow round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, graphic print with lettering on the front, nike swoosh printed on the left sleeve, and engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees with like colours Do not soak or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Dry cleanable This sporty and versatile yellow t-shirt from nike is a must-have in your wardrobe. Wear the smart tee when you go running in the park, or when you are running away from a pack of dogs, or escaping from your girlfriend's angry dad! Engineered with Nike's Dri Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable as you run. And you can wear it even when you're not running as well. Team it with jeans, tracks or shorts and get going.
